data.name: Jassie Pulse
data.description: Lightning-fast text intelligence that never forgets. Hold million-token conversations, get perfectly structured JSON on demand, and ship multilingual experiences — all at the lowest cost per token in the lineup.

data.name: Jassie Bolt
data.description: See, read, and reason — all at once. Processes text, images, and video together, delivering breakthrough accuracy on complex reasoning, vision, and agentic tasks.

data.name: Jassie Pixel
data.description: Generate photorealistic 2K images from a single prompt with fine-grained control, reference guidance, and reproducible outputs.

data.name: Jassie Pixel X
data.description: 4K image generation with maximum detail and control. Designed for print-ready and production-grade visual outputs.

data.name: Jassie Vibe
data.description: Generate 720p video clips with audio from text or images. Fast, consistent, and ideal for prototyping and social content.

data.name: Jassie Motion
data.description: Full HD 1080p video generation with smooth motion and cinematic quality, suitable for professional content production.

data.name: Jassie Cinema
data.description: 4K long-form video generation with scene continuity, intelligent camera work, and cinematic storytelling.

data.name: Jassie Beat
data.description: Generate full multi-instrument music tracks from text prompts, including optional lyrics and production-ready stems.

data.name: Jassie Code
data.description: Advanced coding model that writes, refactors, and debugs across multiple languages with deep codebase understanding.

data.name: Jassie Web
data.description: Provides real-time web access with citation-backed structured responses, designed for agents, RAG pipelines, and live data retrieval.
